# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S18-T1-A-E2
import numpy as np
montos = np.array([5, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 40], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(montos, [0.25, 0.75])
print("Q1", round(float(q1), 2))
print("Q3", round(float(q3), 2))
print("IQR", round(float(q3 - q1), 2))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S18-T1-A-E3
import numpy as np

def resumen(x):
    x = np.asarray(x, dtype=float)
    return {
        "valor": int(x.size),
        "mean": round(float(x.mean()), 4),
        "median": round(float(np.median(x)), 4),
        "std": round(float(x.std(ddof=1)), 4),
    }
print(resumen([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S18-T1-A-E3: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E3 (transferencia) — Concepto: función resumen n/mean/median/std. Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección.

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S18-T3-A-E3
import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = z.copy()
y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1)
by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1])
ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
# residuales ~0 → corr inestable; reporta max abs residual
print("r_raw", round(r_raw, 3))
print("max_abs_resid", round(float(max(np.max(np.abs(rx)), np.max(np.abs(ry)))), 6))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S18-T3-A-E3: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E3 (transferencia) — Concepto: correlación residual tras confusor. Fixture `S18-T3-A-E3` / datos sintéticos: z = np.arange(5, dtype=float); …». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `import numpy as np`. Pista del paquete: «Residualiza x e y respecto a z.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección. Variante explorer del ancla `import numpy as np`.

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S18-T3-B-E3
import numpy as np
m = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 100], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(m, [0.25, 0.75])
iqr = q3 - q1
lo, hi = q1 - 1.5 * iqr, q3 + 1.5 * iqr
print(((m < lo) | (m > hi)).tolist())

# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S18-T4-B-E3
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, 0.0, 3.0]})

note = {"n_raw": n_raw, "n_final": len(df2), "seed": 42}
print(note)
